title: Preparing for an FDA Inspection from the UK
alt: Five ordered steps to prepare a UK site for an FDA inspection

items.label: Map FDA vs EU GMP
items.desc: Treat 21 CFR 211 as a parallel rulebook, not an MHRA repeat

items.label: Build readiness early
items.desc: Self-inspect, mature CAPA and lock down data integrity

items.label: Rehearse the team
items.desc: Lead, scribe, runners, SMEs and a back room

items.label: Ready site & documents
items.desc: Walk the floor; index records to match the paperwork

items.label: Manage visit & 483
items.desc: Daily wash-ups; root-cause response within 15 days
